mostInteresting.reason: Loopscale launched an 'Ecosystem Page' discovery feature that aggregates yield, rewards, and points across Solana protocols (Solstice, OnRe, Hylo) with integrated lending and looping. This is a direct competitive threat to Kamino's market position as it positions Loopscale as a yield aggregation/discovery layer that could fragment user liquidity across multiple lending protocols rather than concentrating it on Kamino.
